arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid can move level on points with leaders Barcelona in La Liga with a victory over Leganes on Saturday evening. The Spanish champions return to action at the Bernabeu against the relegation-threatened visitors. Barcelona moved three points clear after beating Osasuna on Thursday night, increasing the pressure on Carlo Ancelotti’s side. However, Real enter […] The post Real Madrid vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Doubts surrounding Real Madrid ahead of key season-end run
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Modric and Camavinga step up as the midfield duo, orchestrating play for a team that will feature three of the Fantastic Four in attack. On the other hand, Brahim is set to start, while doubts remain over Alaba.
